evals.prompt: Add a new 'comments' table. Each comment belongs to a user and a post, has a body text field, and supports soft delete.
evals.expected_output: New SQLAlchemy model with proper relationships, exported and registered for Alembic
expectations: Includes is_deleted: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False) for soft delete
Has ForeignKey references to users.id and posts.id
Instructions include running pnpm db:create with a descriptive message

evals.prompt: Add a 'status' enum column to the existing files model. Statuses: pending, processing, available, failed.
evals.expected_output: Enum defined in constants.py, model updated, migration created
expectations: Enum class defined in packages/db/constants.py, not inline in the model
Model update uses Mapped[FileStatus] with proper default
Migration command uses pnpm db:create, not raw alembic
Does not hard-code enum values as plain strings

evals.prompt: Add a JSON metadata column and a nullable description field to the buckets model
evals.expected_output: Model fields added with proper SQLAlchemy types
expectations: Uses sqlalchemy JSON type for metadata column with default=dict
Description field is Mapped[str | None] with nullable=True
Migration is created via pnpm db:create command
Does not modify BaseModel timestamps or id fields
